comment: Quality Gates catalog -- cross-platform dimension. v0.12.0 ships stub rows only (NOT-VERIFIED + waiver until 2026-07-26 tracked_in v0.12.1 CROSS-* placeholders). v0.12.0 ships ubuntu-only matrix; v0.12.1 MIGRATE-03 (d) wires the windows-2022 + macos-14 GH Actions matrix rehearsals. Schema spec: quality/catalogs/README.md.

asserts: v0.12.1 stub -- the curl-installer + cargo-binstall paths rehearse green on a windows-2022 GH Actions runner

rows.owner_hint: v0.12.1 CROSS-01 stub: windows GH runners cost ~$0.08/min and v0.12.0 ships ubuntu-only matrix.

waiver.reason: RENEWED P90 90-05 (2026-07-04): windows GH runners still cost ~$0.08/min and the workspace still ships an ubuntu-only local matrix; verifier confirmed still absent (`quality/gates/cross-platform/` is empty save README.md/.gitkeep). The 'v0.12.1 CROSS-01' label was dead (v0.12.1 never shipped this gate) -- repointed per D90-02(c) mass-renewal rule.
waiver.tracked_in: P97 (Good-to-haves polish + milestone close, launch-readiness slot) -- windows/macos GH Actions runner-cost decision

rows.claim_vs_assertion_audit: If the curl-installer + cargo-binstall paths actually worked on windows-2022, a real GH Actions run against that runner image would exit 0; the verifier script's confirmed absence means no such run has ever executed, which directly falsifies any claim of windows coverage today.

asserts: v0.12.1 stub -- the curl-installer + cargo-binstall paths rehearse green on a macos-14 GH Actions runner

rows.owner_hint: v0.12.1 CROSS-02 stub: macos GH runners cost ~$0.08/min and v0.12.0 ships ubuntu-only matrix.

waiver.reason: RENEWED P90 90-05 (2026-07-04): macos GH runners still cost ~$0.08/min and the workspace still ships an ubuntu-only local matrix; verifier confirmed still absent. The 'v0.12.1 CROSS-02' label was dead -- repointed per D90-02(c) mass-renewal rule.
waiver.tracked_in: P97 (Good-to-haves polish + milestone close, launch-readiness slot) -- windows/macos GH Actions runner-cost decision

rows.claim_vs_assertion_audit: If the curl-installer + cargo-binstall paths actually worked on macos-14, a real GH Actions run against that runner image would exit 0; the verifier script's confirmed absence means no such run has ever executed, which directly falsifies any claim of macos coverage today.
